title: Anthropic launches free Claude for Teachers for US K-12 educators
watch: A school/district-wide version of Claude for Teachers, once it launches
Independent (non-Anthropic-sourced) confirmation of the nine named ed-tech integrations, or of the Teach For America 'AI Fluency' course

cycle_2026-07-17_night_c3_note: New standalone story (dedup-check: no match). Candidate first surfaced in cycle 1's Tier-0 sweep of Anthropic News; carried forward untouched through cycle 2 given time spent on the EU/Google story. Fresh verifier sub-agent (primary-page fetch + 6 web searches) and an independent adversarial falsifier sub-agent (7 web searches) ran in parallel, both time-boxed. Both independently concluded CLEAR TO PUBLISH. Two self-reported/single-source elements (the nine-partner integration list, the Teach For America course) were kept out of the frontmatter claim set and instead mentioned in body prose attributed plainly to Anthropic. The Gates Foundation tie-in is framed as an existing (14 May 2026) partnership, not new news. Style gates run on both languages: pass (see report).
